symptoms: Fever, skin nodules/lumps, swollen lymph nodes, reduced milk yield, nasal discharge, weakness
possible_cause: Lumpy skin disease virus spread by biting insects, contact, contaminated materials
basic_remedy_supportive_care: Isolate animal, provide clean water, soft nutritious feed, shade, wound cleaning, reduce stress
medication_note: Veterinarian may prescribe anti-inflammatory drugs, antibiotics for secondary infection, supportive treatment
cleaning_hygiene: Disinfect shed, control flies/mosquitoes/ticks, clean bedding, avoid sharing tools
prevention: Vaccination where available, vector control, quarantine new animals
warning: Highly contagious in herds; seek veterinary guidance quickly

symptoms: Fever, mouth blisters, drooling, foot lesions, limping, reduced appetite, milk drop
possible_cause: Foot-and-mouth disease virus spread through contact, aerosols, feed, equipment
basic_remedy_supportive_care: Isolate animal, soft feed, plenty of water, clean mouth/foot lesions gently, rest animal
medication_note: No direct cure; veterinarian may give pain relief, fever control, treatment for secondary infection
cleaning_hygiene: Disinfect floors and tools, restrict movement, separate sick animals
prevention: Vaccination programs, strict biosecurity, quarantine new/sick animals
warning: Fast-spreading outbreak disease; report according to local rules
